changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: STABLE (Day 18 18:00): ZERO de-escalation signals. Iran FM calls diplomacy 'delusional'. Hormuz effectively blockaded. Israel wide-scale strikes on Tehran. Lebanon ground invasion expanding. Oil >$100. No ceasefire in ANY theater.

latest_news.headline: IDF deploys second division to southern Lebanon — ground invasion expands
latest_news.text: Israeli military deploys second division to southern Lebanon as part of 'limited and targeted ground operations.' IDF pushing deeper. Hezbollah fires dozens of rockets + 5 drones at northern Israel. IAF strikes dozens of Hezbollah targets in Dahiyeh (Beirut).

latest_news.headline: UN says some Israeli strikes in Lebanon may be war crimes — healthcare center hit
latest_news.text: UN rights office says some Israeli strikes may constitute war crimes. Damaged healthcare center with multiple medical personnel casualties. 886 killed including 67 women and 111 children since fighting renewed.

latest_news.headline: Iran confirms security chief Ali Larijani killed — state media reverses denial
latest_news.text: Iran state media confirms Ali Larijani killed in Israeli strike. Initially appeared to deny with handwritten note, now confirmed dead. Basij commander also confirmed killed. Major regime decapitation.

latest_news.headline: Russia expanding intelligence sharing and military cooperation with Iran
latest_news.text: Russia has been expanding intelligence sharing and military cooperation with Iran since the war began nearly three weeks ago. Not yet direct intervention but deepening support.

latest_news.headline: Trump reverses: US 'doesn't need NATO help, never did' on Hormuz
latest_news.text: Trump reverses stance from threatening NATO to saying US doesn't need alliance's help for Hormuz. NATO allies have refused commitments. Germany says 'not a matter for NATO.' UK won't be 'drawn into wider war.' Going unilateral.

latest_news.headline: 1,200+ Iranian civilians killed per Red Crescent — 'funerals instead of festivities'
latest_news.text: Iranian Red Crescent reports 1,200+ killed. ICRC head in Iran says civilians paying 'heavy price.' Tehran daily life disrupted, schools closed. Nowruz festivities replaced by funerals. Children's wards full of casualties.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 20, 22:04 UTC) — Ground invasion of Lebanon confirmed: 2nd IDF division deployed, pushing deeper south. 886 killed, UN says war crimes. Iran confirms Larijani killed — regime decapitation. Russia deepens intel/military cooperation with Iran. Trump goes unilateral on Hormuz. 1,200+ Iranian civilians dead. Zero ceasefire signals in any theater.

Status quo maintained. No PLA activity changes detected. Taiwan Strait remains stable.
Afghan-Pakistan border tensions likely to persist. Additional clashes probable based on recent trajectory.
